---
title: "ModeloBSTS"
output: word_document
---

# Carga de los Paquetes

```{r}
#install.packages("bsts")
library(bsts)
```

# Carga de Base de Datos

```{r}
library(readr)
base <- read_csv("~/Downloads/premier_league_complete_stats_until31thGameDayOnSeason2025-26.csv")
View(premier_league_complete_stats_until31thGameDayOnSeason2025_26)
```
